use_cases: Creates an immersive retro/cyberpunk background effect for landing pages and hero sections
Adds animated perspective grid visuals to gaming interfaces and creative portfolios
Provides customizable neon grid backgrounds for tech and creative landing pages
Serves as an ambient visual layer for event or product reveal pages
Delivers nostalgic arcade-style aesthetic for retro-themed digital experiences
ai_summary: A customizable 3D perspective grid component that renders an animated retro-style grid with configurable colors, scanline effects, and glow. The grid scrolls infinitely using 2D canvas projection techniques, creating an immersive neon cyberpunk atmosphere. Perfect for retro-themed landing pages, gaming interfaces, or creative portfolios seeking nostalgic arcade aesthetics.
